# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-serviceaccount
namespace: linkerd

---

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: ClusterAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: kubernetes-autoscaler
spec:
  scaleZone: "<your-k8s-zone>"

---

kind: LinkerdStrategy
apiVersion: apps.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  autodetect: {}

---

apiVersion: apps.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: HelmRelease
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  chart: stable/linkerd2
  version: latest
  values:
    autodetect: {}
    kubernetesNetworkPolicy: true

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservice-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: linkerd
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: microservice
